title: Lesson: CBet River
plan: Read PDF classes/RegLife-C-BETRIVER.pdf to extract triple barrel CBet criteria, river card evaluation rules, and polarization concepts
Implement _eval_cbet_river() method in src/analyzers/lesson_classifier.py following the pattern of _eval_cbet_turn(), evaluating hand polarization, river texture, and blocker effects
Wire _eval_cbet_river() into classify_hand() for lesson 16, replacing the generic _eval_cbet() call currently at line ~681
Add 20-30 test cases in tests/test_lesson_classifier.py covering correct triple barrels (nutted hands, bluffs with blockers), incorrect executions (marginal hands, dangerous rivers), and edge cases
Run quality gates (typecheck, lint, test, build) and fix any failures
Update .ai/tasks/prd.json to mark US-049 as done and commit all changes
